issue.title: @gitclaw /backup provenance e2e 20260531T050153Z
issue.body:
Live backup provenance E2E.

Hidden backup provenance token: GITCLAW_BACKUP_PROVENANCE_E2E_20260531T050153Z
This should produce a deterministic backup report, then the fetched backup branch should render body-free git provenance for the backup files.
issue.author: AnandChowdhary

transcript.Body:
@gitclaw /backup provenance e2e 20260531T050153Z

Live backup provenance E2E.

Hidden backup provenance token: GITCLAW_BACKUP_PROVENANCE_E2E_20260531T050153Z
This should produce a deterministic backup report, then the fetched backup branch should render body-free git provenance for the backup files.

## GitClaw Backup Report

Generated without a model call.

- repository: `AnandChowdhary/gitclaw`
- issue: `#352`
- requested_backup_command: `provenance`
- backup_command_status: `ok`
- backup_branch: `gitclaw-backups`
- backup_root: `.gitclaw/backups`
- repo_backup_dir: `.gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw`
- issue_backup_path: `.gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw/issues/000352.json`
- index_path: `.gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw/index.json`
- readme_path: `.gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw/README.md`
- backup_schema_version: `1`
- raw_comments_now: `0`
- transcript_messages_now: `1`
- assistant_turn_comments_now: `0`
- issue_title_sha256_12: `542c90ef239d`
- issue_side_execution: `deferred_to_post_turn_backup_branch`
- raw_bodies_included: `false`
- requested_local_command: `gitclaw backup provenance --root .gitclaw/backups --repo AnandChowdhary/gitclaw`
- backup_provenance_status: `deferred`
- backup_provenance_execution: `local_fetched_backup_branch`
- backup_provenance_gates: `verify, git-history, body-free-output`
- raw_backup_payloads_scanned_issue_side: `false`
- raw_git_subjects_included: `false`
- author_identities_included: `false`
- llm_e2e_required_after_backup_provenance_change: `true`

The backup job runs after a successful assistant turn and writes the raw transcript backup plus repo-scoped index to the dedicated backup branch.

Issue and comment bodies are not included in this report; the raw backup JSON is the canonical transcript copy. Requested backup subcommands are recorded here as issue-visible intent, then run locally against a fetched `gitclaw-backups` branch.

### Backup Contents
- issue metadata
- raw issue comments
- reconstructed transcript with GitClaw assistant markers stripped
- generation timestamp
- schema version

### Requested Command
- `provenance` requested from the issue thread
- run `gitclaw backup provenance --root .gitclaw/backups --repo AnandChowdhary/gitclaw` after fetching `gitclaw-backups`
- issue-side execution is metadata-only because the backup branch is written after this assistant turn

### Verification
- `gitclaw backup verify --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo>`
- `gitclaw backup coverage --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo> --issue <number>`
- `gitclaw backup drill --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo> --issue <number>`
- `gitclaw backup risk --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo>`
- `gitclaw backup provenance --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo>`
- `gitclaw backup timeline --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo> --limit 20`
- `gitclaw backup search --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo> <query>`
- `gitclaw backup retention-plan --root .gitclaw/backups --repo <owner/repo> --keep-latest 50`
- validates the repo-scoped index, README, canonical issue paths, JSON schema version, counts, timestamps, traversal-safe payload paths, and git provenance; search reports hashes and metadata without printing raw backup bodies
